EDHD432

Internship in EC/ECSE

Total Credits

Other Requirements for the Major

An overall grade point average of 2.75 must be maintained after admission to Teacher Education. All teacher candidates are required to obtain satisfactory evaluations on the College of Education Foundational Competencies/Technical Standards and to attain qualifying scores for the State of Maryland on a test of basic skills and Praxis II assessments. The test of basic skills is required for admission, and Praxis II is required for admission to the ﬁnal, culminating semester of the yearlong internship and for graduation. Students must complete ﬁve-semesters of ﬁeld placement, to include the yearlong internship which takes place in a public Professional Development School (PDS)/collaborating partner school.
